---
title: "Figure 5 (Fisher variability) — macro_IR Gaussian vs numeric Fisher: relative bootstrap variability over the plane"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Which Fisher is more variable across recordings? For each diagonal entry F_kk we take its relative
bootstrap uncertainty rel = (q0.975 - q0.025) / (2 |mean|) as the variability measure, for
  GAUSSIAN Fisher : Moment_statistics_Sum_Gaussian_Fisher_Information (analytic FIM, PSD by build)
  NUMERIC  Fisher : Likelihood_Numerical_Fisher_Information (finite-difference / observed info)
both from *_battery_sim.csv (same recordings, same bootstrap -> a fair comparison; no cloud read).
Line view: y = relative variability (log), x = interval, colour = N_ch, GAUSSIAN solid / NUMERIC
dashed, faceted parameter x noise. Expectation: numeric sits well above gaussian. ALGO = macro_IR.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR <- "../data/433ed13"
NSIM     <- 10000
NOISES   <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
ALGO     <- "macro_IR"

ORD       <- c("on", "off", "unitary_current", "Num_ch_mean")
PIDX      <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")
```

```{r read}
read_tagged <- function(z) {
  files <- Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_battery_sim.csv", NSIM, ALGO, z)))
  map_dfr(files, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% mutate(noise = z))
}
bsim <- map_dfr(NOISES, read_tagged)
```

```{r variability}
# relative bootstrap variability of the DIAGONAL of a Fisher component: (hi - lo) / (2 |mean|)
diag_relcv <- function(df, comp, stat) {
  df %>%
    filter(component_path == comp, statistic == stat,
           param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX,
           probit == "mean" | (probit == "quantile" & quantile_level %in% c(0.025, 0.975))) %>%
    mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)],
           q = if_else(probit == "mean", "m", if_else(quantile_level == 0.025, "lo", "hi"))) %>%
    group_by(noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name, q) %>%
    summarise(v = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = q, values_from = v) %>%
    filter(is.finite(m), m != 0, is.finite(lo), is.finite(hi)) %>%
    transmute(noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name, rel = (hi - lo) / (2 * abs(m)))
}

gauss <- diag_relcv(bsim, "Probit_statistics_Moment_statistics_Sum_Gaussian_Fisher_Information", "mean") %>%
  mutate(type = "Gaussian Fisher")
numer <- diag_relcv(bsim, "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Numerical_Fisher_Information", "value") %>%
  mutate(type = "numeric Fisher")

nch_lev <- sort(unique(c(gauss$Num_ch, numer$Num_ch)))
dd <- bind_rows(gauss, numer) %>%
  filter(rel > 0) %>%
  mutate(param  = factor(param_name, levels = ORD, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD])),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)),
         Nch    = factor(Num_ch, levels = nch_lev),
         type   = factor(type, levels = c("Gaussian Fisher", "numeric Fisher")))
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 8.0}
g <- ggplot(dd, aes(interval_in_tau, rel, colour = Nch,
                    linetype = type, group = interaction(Num_ch, type))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = .4) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = type), size = .6) +
  facet_grid(param ~ noisef, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(.01, .1, 1)) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(name = expression(N[ch]), end = .9) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Gaussian Fisher" = "solid", "numeric Fisher" = "22"), name = NULL) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Gaussian Fisher" = 16, "numeric Fisher" = 1), name = NULL) +
  labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = "relative bootstrap variability of  F(diag)",
       title = "macro_IR  Fisher variability: Gaussian (solid) vs numeric (dashed)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8), plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
g
ggsave("Figure_5_fisher_variability.pdf", g, width = 7.0, height = 8.0)
```
